description: Letter from Zekharya b. Gedalya b. ʿAyyāsh, in Ṣahrajt, to Mūsā b. Abū l-Ḥayy, in Alexandria. Dating: ca. 1063 CE. Regarding deliveries of money, especially one of seven dinars that Habub b. Haban from Sfax sent, and asks to buy spices and perfumes and sell them for him In Alexandria. (Information from Gil, Kingdom, Vol. 4, #719) VMR
description_he: מכתב מזכריה בן גדליה בן עיאש, בצהרג'ת, למוסא בן אבו אל-חי, כ-1063
